[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../../index.md) / [transport/http/http](../index.md) / startHttpServer

# startHttpServer()

```ts
function startHttpServer(createServer: () => McpServer, port: number): void;
```

Defined in: [transport/http/http.ts:51](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/4112cd2ee9b9b05525039f4b7b060594d2aa7744/src/app/transport/http/http.ts#L51)

Starts the Streamable HTTP transport for the MCP server.

## Parameters

| Parameter      | Type              | Description                                                 |
| -------------- | ----------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| `createServer` | () => `McpServer` | Factory function that creates a new MCP server per session. |
| `port`         | `number`          | TCP port to listen on.                                      |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Exposes four endpoints:

- `POST /mcp` — handles MCP protocol messages and session initialization
- `GET /mcp` — SSE backward-compatible streaming
- `DELETE /mcp` — terminates a session
- `GET /health` — health check returning `{ status: "ok" }`

Each initialize request creates a new `NodeStreamableHTTPServerTransport`
and MCP server instance. Subsequent requests reuse the transport via the
`Mcp-Session-Id` header.

## Example

```ts
startHttpServer(() => createMcpServer(config), config.port);
```
